positive: Minimalist silhouette of a majestic, stylized fox standing on a stylized crescent moon, surrounded by swirling floral wreaths and intricate astronomical patterns. The fox is drawn in a clean, graphic, woodcut style with high contrast black lines on a solid pale cream background. Emphasize strong, crisp linework, deep black ink, and elegant negative space. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed for a seamless print repeat. Details include stylized constellations, simple geometric elements, and repeating floral motifs (e.g., lavender, eucalyptus). Studio lighting, vector art aesthetic, highly detailed, graphic design.
negative: blur, noise, watermark, logo, text, signature, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, low contrast, photographic, photorealism, gradients
